ordinanceLabel: Ordinance No. 757 · Adopted 2022 (current through Ord. 777, June 17, 2025)
suggestedQuestions: Is my property in a fire hazard severity zone?
Does my remodel trigger the automatic sprinkler requirement?

Do I need Napa County Environmental Health review for my restaurant?
Can I use wood shake roofing on my home?
